items.name_en: 666212 Small Boston Pillow Bag 💫 Original Goods 💫 ESSENTIAL VISETOS Boston Bag. This Boston bag features MCM's iconic Visetos, revealing a touch of freshness ☁️ in a classic style. Paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel, this bag evokes the feeling of a weekend ✈️ travel bag. The top handle is hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted. Fine craftsmanship. Small size: 23*15*12

items.name_cn:
666213 Mini Essential Boston Bag,
A fresh take on a classic silhouette. This Boston bag, paying homage to MCM's rooted travel philosophy, evokes the spirit of a weekend travel bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper for easy opening. Exquisitely crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the top handle is hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted. Size: 18x10x8cm

items.name_cn:
666703 New Basket Bag
[MCM] Toni Visetos Shopping Bag New Look, Super Beautiful 👗 This small shopping bag is versatile and timeless. Don't be fooled by the size of this mini shopping bag; it features spacious compartments inside and out to store all your small essentials. The cotton canvas lining features an inspired street fashion print, subtly preserving MCM's adventurous aesthetic spirit. With the included crossbody strap, it offers hands-free functionality and better portability.
No ❤️ Charm
Size: 18.5x19x9.5cm
Bag Opening Width: 26cm
Adjustable and Removable Shoulder Strap
Zipper Closure
External Back Slip Pocket
Internal Zipper Pocket
Internal Open Pocket
Leather Trim: Nappa leather
Metal-tone Hardware
Fabric Lining
External D-ring Decoration

items.name_cn:
666718Large Shopping Tote
⚰️【MCM】Toni Visetos Shopping Bag: This medium shopping bag features a slightly angular design, embodying the classic functionality of MCM bags. The Toni shopping bag is made of classic Visetos material and is accented with soft Nappa leather trim, combining aesthetic appeal with strong practicality. The interior features a luxurious cotton canvas divider printed with a chain-link pattern inspired by MCM street fashion tradition. A top zip closure ensures the security of your belongings.
Size: 32x32x16cm Top leather handle Zip closure Internal main compartment with zip pocket and two open pockets External back open pocket MCM Logo plate Leather trim Metal-tone hardware Fabric lining

specs.rawTitle:
666718Large Shopping Tote
⚰️【MCM】Toni Visetos Shopping Bag: This medium shopping bag features a slightly angular design, embodying the classic functionality of MCM bags. The Toni shopping bag is made of classic Visetos material and is accented with soft Nappa leather trim, combining aesthetic appeal with strong practicality. The interior features a luxurious cotton canvas divider printed with a chain-link pattern inspired by MCM street fashion tradition. A top zip closure ensures the security of your belongings.
Size: 32x32x16cm Top leather handle Zip closure Internal main compartment with zip pocket and two open pockets External back open pocket MCM Logo plate Leather trim Metal-tone hardware Fabric lining

items.name_cn:
666721 New Horn Bag
🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 Original stock 2024 New Horn Bag AREN VISETOS HOBO Shoulder Bag
This Visetos Hobo bag features an adjustable 🐂 leather shoulder strap and is decorated with a leather tag with a lock 🔒. A modern interpretation of a classic casual style, striking a perfect balance between softness and structure. This small-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag incorporates design elements from the traditional 🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 suitcase, including a detachable leather tag and carved logo lock, adding the finishing touch.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: White
Dimensions: 26x19x9.5cm
